summary: Made two surgical seam edits: one in the opening to connect the scene more directly to the paperwork pressure established at the end of the previous chapter, and one in the closing paragraph to aim Halima's worry toward the school setting that opens the next chapter.
edits: Added an opening-line bridge noting that the school's documentation demands have turned Halima's mat into a daily paper-sorting space.
Added a final-sentence bridge pointing Kashem's suspicion toward the school before the next chapter's public notice scene.
